name: an AWS + CloudFormation vision activates the aws and cfn probe groups
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "REST API on AWS with CloudFormation and Terraform" --classify 2>/dev/null); echo "$OUT" | ruby -rjson -e 'a=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["activated_probe_namespaces"]; exit(a.include?("aws") && a.include?("cfn") ? 0:1)' && echo aws-cfn-activated 1>&2
